name: file_converter
description: Convert files between common formats: JSON ↔ YAML, JSON ↔ CSV, JSON → Markdown, CSV → Markdown, CSV → YAML, Markdown → HTML, HTML → plain text, and more. Detects source format automatically from file extension or content. Use list_formats to see all supported conversion routes.

input.description: Path to the source file to convert or detect. Required for 'convert' and 'detect'.

output.description: Path for the converted output file. If omitted for 'convert', the output file is placed in the same directory as the input with an appropriate extension.

from_format.description: Source format override. Auto-detected from extension if omitted.

to_format.description: Target format for conversion. Derived from output file extension if omitted.

title.description: Document title used when generating HTML output. Default 'Document'.
